zh.Lancaster, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾蘭卡斯特
zh.Little Hulton, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾蕾托 爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Hulton於1295年出生在英國藍卡爾法爾沃斯時，他的父親Henry de Hulton33歲，母親Agnes de Bowden26歲。他於1324年與Alicia de Radcliffe在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Lancaster, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾蘭卡斯特
zh-hans.Little Hulton, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾蕾托 爾頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Hulton于1295年出生在英国藍卡爾法爾沃斯时，他的父亲Henry de Hulton33岁，母亲Agnes de Bowden26岁。他于1324年与Alicia de Radcliffe在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Hulton (Lancashire) or Hulton (Staffordshire), both from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Hilton .

variants.name: Hilton
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Hilton (e.g. in Cambridgeshire, Derbyshire, Staffordshire, North Yorkshire, and Westmorland), most of which derive from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some come from Old English helde ‘slope’ + tūn.

occasionally, as in the case of Ralph filius Hilton (Yorkshire 1219), perhaps from the personal name Hilton, itself a possible form of Norman Hildun, composed of the ancient Germanic elements hild ‘strife, battle’ + hūn ‘bear cub’. Compare Hilt . This English surname is present in Ireland (mainly taken to Ulster in the early 17th century, though recorded earlier in Dublin).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Hulton was born in 1295, in Farnworth, Lancashire, England, his father, Henry de Hulton, was 33 and his mother, Agnes de Bowden, was 26. He married Alicia de Radcliffe in 1324, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Hulton est né en 1295, à Farnworth, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Hulton, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Bowden, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Alicia de Radcliffe en 1324, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Hulton 1295 in Farnworth, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Hulton 33 und seine Mutter Agnes de Bowden 26. Er hat 1324 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Alicia de Radcliffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Hulton è nato il nel 1295 nel Farnworth, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Henry de Hulton, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Bowden, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Alicia de Radcliffe nel 1324, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Hultonが1295年にイギリスランカシュアイアファルンウオルスで生まれた時，父Henry de Hultonは33歳，母Agnes de Bowdenは26歳であった。1324年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでAlicia de Radcliffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Hulton(이)가 1295년 영국 랭카실르 패른워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Hulton(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Bowden(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1324년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Alicia de Radcliffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

mn.Lancaster, England: Lancaster, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Hulton nasceu em 1295, em Farnworth, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Hulton, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Bowden, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Alicia de Radcliffe em 1324, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Hulton родился в 1295 г. в местности фарнворт, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Hulton было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Bowden, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Alicia de Radcliffe в 1324 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Hulton nació en 1295, en Farnworth, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Hulton, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Agnes de Bowden, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Alicia de Radcliffe en 1324, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas.
